Enumerations

enum  _MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_EXTENSION {
  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_CHANNEL_INFO, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FAMILY_INFO, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_VIDEO_CAPS, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_AUDIO_CAPS,
  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_DEVICE_INSTANCE_ID, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FIRMWARE_STORAGE, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FIRMWARE_ERASE, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_FIRMWARE_DATA,

  MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIMER_REGISTRATION, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIMER_DEREGISTRATION, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_TIMER_EXPIRE_TIME, MWCAP_KSPROPERTY_NOTIFY_REGISTRATION,
